description: A v0.2.0 Class C artifact whose evidence entry carries a signature that does NOT verify under the declared attester's pubkey (one byte of the valid signature XOR'd with 0x01) MUST be rejected as INVALID with reason SIGNATURE_VERIFY_FAILED. Same keypair as class-c-valid-signed-attestation; same body; only the signature is mutated.

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Signature did not verify; consensus invalid.

why: SPEC_LOCK_v0.2.0 §2.7 C5: the signature byte 0 was flipped (0x96 → 0x97 before base64 encoding). Ed25519 verification MUST fail. Exercises C5 (signature-verify failure detection) and the SIGNATURE_VERIFY_FAILED reason code. Adversarial: this is the bit-flip attack — any verifier that does not actually run Ed25519 verification would accept this artifact, breaking the entire consensus integrity story.
